name: Exosister Arment
name_jp: エクソシスター・アーメント
desc: Pay 800 LP, then target 1 "Exosister" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Exosister" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck with a different name than the cards you control, by using that target as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.) You can only activate 1 "Exosister Arment" per turn. You can only activate this card during your opponent's turn, unless your opponent controls a monster Special Summoned from the GY.
eff: Pay 800 LP, then target 1 "Exosister" monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Exosister" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck with a different name than the cards you control, by using that target as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.) You can only activate 1 "Exosister Arment" per turn. You can only activate this card during your opponent's turn, unless your opponent controls a monster Special Summoned from the GY.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
